value: Yao, S., Zhao, J., Yu, D., Du, N., Shafran, I., Narasimhan, K., & Cao, Y. (2022). ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models. arXiv:2210.03629. Justifies the reason→act→observe loop used in run_agent_loop.

Vemprala, S., Bonatti, R., Bucker, A., & Kapoor, A. (2023). ChatGPT for Robotics: Design Principles and Model Abilities. MSR-TR-2023-8. arXiv:2306.17582. Closest prior work: GPT-4 on UAV tasks via structured function-call API. Provides API call overhead and success-rate benchmarks for comparison.
